name: Zach Hill
description: '''Zachary Charles Hill''' (born December 28, 1979) is an American [[multi-instrumentalist]] and [[visual artist]]. He is best known as the drummer and co-producer of industrial hip-hop band [[Death Grips]], experimental rock band [[the I.L.Y's]], as well as the drummer of [[math rock]] band [[Hella (band)|Hella]].
